description: Connects the Laporta constants to both electron and muon anomalous magnetic moments through the same A4 coefficient. The universal (mass-independent) A4 enters both a_e and a_mu at (alpha/pi)^4. The muon g-2 has a ~5 sigma tension. This derivation chain tests whether A4's contribution is large enough to affect the tension and whether the ratio of sensitivities (muon/electron) reveals toroidal scaling with lepton mass.
thesis: The same six Laporta constants contribute to both a_e and a_mu. The ratio of contributions probes how four-loop toroidal geometry scales between the two leptons. If the mass-dependent corrections at four loops differ significantly from the universal piece, the toroidal structure has mass-dependent moduli.
